roles.title: Sales Development Representative
roles.description: Open and qualify conversations with premium venues, and set up the product walkthroughs that move operators toward Clubtech.

roles.title: Product Support
roles.description: Help venue teams get the most from the platform — answer questions, reproduce and test issues, and feed real usability findings back to product.

roles.title: Back-End Developer
roles.description: Build and maintain the Laravel and PHP services and APIs behind bookings, operations, and revenue, with MySQL at the core.

roles.title: Front-End Developer
roles.description: Build the guest booking journey and operator interfaces in React, Next.js, and TypeScript — close to how venues actually use the product.

roles.title: DevOps Engineer
roles.description: Run and harden the cloud infrastructure across AWS, Azure, and GCP — the networking, DNS, CDN, SSL, and storage that keep the platform reliable.
